help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to your questions
help.noResultsDesc: We couldn't find any help articles matching
help.heroSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about buying, selling, and staying safe on Suqafuran.
help.faqBuy1Q: How do I buy an item on Suqafuran?
help.faqBuy1A: Buying is simple! Browse or search for items, click on a listing you like, and use the "Chat" or "Reveal Phone" buttons to contact the seller directly. Always meet in person in a safe, public place to inspect the item before paying.
help.faqBuy2A: Many sellers are open to offers. You can discuss the price with the seller through our in-app chat or by calling them. Look for the "Negotiable" tag on listings.
help.faqSell1Q: How do I post an ad?
help.faqSell1A: Click the "Post New Ad" button in your dashboard or the "Sell Now" button in the header. Choose a category, upload clear photos, add a descriptive title and price, then click "Post Listing". It's free!
help.faqSell2Q: How can I sell my items faster?
help.faqSell2A: To sell faster: 1. Use high-quality photos. 2. Write a detailed description. 3. Set a fair, competitive price. 4. Become a "Verified Seller" to build more trust with buyers.
help.faqSafety1Q: How do I stay safe while trading?
help.faqSafety1A: Safety is our priority. Always meet in public places (like malls or cafes), never send money before seeing the item, and trust your instincts. If a deal seems too good to be true, it probably is.
help.faqSafety2Q: What is the Verified Seller program?
help.faqSafety2A: Our Verified Seller program badges sellers who have provided official ID documentation. This helps buyers identify trustworthy partners. You can apply for verification in your account settings.
help.faqAccount1Q: How do I change my password?
help.faqAccount1A: Go to "Account Settings" from your dashboard sidebar. In the "Security" tab, you can update your password and manage your active sessions.
help.faqAccount2Q: I forgot my password, what should I do?
help.faqAccount2A: On the login page, click "Forgot Password?". Enter your email address, and we'll send you a secure link to reset it.

about.mission: Our Mission is to Connect Africa through Commerce
about.missionDesc: Suqafuran is more than just a marketplace. It's a community where trust and technology meet.
about.trustDesc: We invest heavily in safety and verification to ensure every transaction is secure.
about.velocityDesc: Our platform is optimized for speed, helping you sell your items in record time.
about.communityDesc: We empower local businesses and individuals to reach more customers daily.
about.builtForAfrica: Built for Africa, by people who care
about.teamDesc: Our team consists of engineers, designers, and customer support specialists dedicated to solving the unique challenges of the African marketplace.

safety.title: Your Safety is Our Priority
safety.subtitle: Follow these simple guidelines to ensure a safe trading experience on Suqafuran.
safety.meetInPublicDesc: Always meet the seller or buyer in a well-lit, busy public place like a mall or police station.
safety.inspectItemDesc: Never pay before you see and test the item yourself. Check for functionality and condition.
safety.payOnDeliveryDesc: Do not send money in advance via M-Pesa or bank transfer. Pay only after receiving the item.
safety.useSecureChatDesc: Keep all communications within the Suqafuran chat to have a record of your conversation.
safety.reportScamTitle: Spot a Scam? Report it Immediately!
safety.reportScamDesc: Our moderation team works 24/7 to remove suspicious listings. If an ad looks too good to be true, it probably is. Help us keep Suqafuran safe by reporting any suspicious behavior.
safety.scam1: Unrealistically low prices for high-end items.
safety.scam2: Sellers who refuse to meet in person.
safety.scam3: Requests for advanced payment or shipping fees.
safety.scam4: Sellers who ask for personal information like passwords or OTPs.
